audit.auditor: blind 3-panel (no-schema); decisions_per_turn=4 unanimous (median over 27 mornings); all 7 deferred obligations carry concrete coefficients; no canon/firewall/fixed-mark/gleam-gate/fifth-token/diegetic-market violation

issues.what: The >=3 decisions_per_turn gate is met on the MEDIAN (=4); the thinnest Green-Going mornings honestly afford 2 (play-subset + route only; chain-order activates ~Deep Gold, reach-vs-safe when room>ceiling+2). The napkin asserts the median, not a per-morning minimum.
issues.fix: Documented in GDD L6 sec8/sec9 as median-based; the home-note seat + guaranteed >=2 answerable needs keep the floor at 2 and the median at 4. game-loop confirms the felt agency of thin early mornings.

issues.what: The fitted coefficients (dawn/room curve, per-tier marks/fills, axis magnitudes, crown magnitudes .70-.99 stand-rates, Untold count/clamp, I-044/045/018 bounds, retire residual) satisfy the napkin SHAPE-checks over hand-authored vectors; the exact balance is asserted, not derived from card-level simulation.
issues.fix: game-loop derives the exact coefficients from bot sims and tunes within the shapes committed here (D-005.3); the napkin fixes the shape the tuning must preserve.

issues.what: I-044 (glad-price 0.5<tempo 2), I-045 (soothe min(rings,2) capped 1/node/season + red-thread <=1 unlock/run), I-022 (UNTOLD_COUNT + D=1.5, clamp 8.5/6->10.2), I-018 (Dcap<=0.3 < Ddiff 1.0*s, >=3.3x margin; dawn 0.5/ring), retire-residual (cycle net-negative), Fair k=2/N=5 — all now carry concrete numbers.
issues.fix: game-loop fits and simulates the exact values; the structural inequalities are committed in L6 and must hold under tuning.

summary: Layer 6 numbers_curves: concrete numbers fitted to the LOCKED L1-L5 substrate and the deferred obligations, proven by an engine-run napkin (9 checks, flags=0). Deck 7->20 / hand 5; per-tier fixed marks (apprentice 1-2 / mid 3-5 / proud 6-7 / capstone 7-8, wd 1-5, twice-benched 0.9x terminal); seep curve PER_MORNING_NEED [1,3,5,7] / S_OF_T / summed [6,18,32,50] / spiral 3-5-7 / combing 7 / crown floor [3,5,7,10] demand 10 delivery 8.5; Standing overkill full-rate-to-a-6-band + soft-capped room (~10) closing the snowball, explicit gleam firewall (season/spiral->size not the meter); integer handsels 1/2/3 with bounded whittle + glad-price 0.5<tempo 2 (I-044) + idle-lapse->dawn only sink; six archetype axis magnitudes (unique-10/column, band 4 [37-41], dominated pairs=0) + crown mags [10.2-12.5] all in [10,14) + Untold count [0.67,2,3.33,4.67]xD1.5 match/forced/clamped (I-022); diegetic renames the-vouching/the-stalls-that-lean-in/the-courting (I-016). Blind 3-auditor panel unanimous decisions_per_turn=4>=3, all obligations covered, no canon violation. AUTO layer -> LOCK_OK on clean napkin. All P1 critic leaks closed (ring-dawn out-scaling I-018, unbounded whittle mint, thin-Green collapse, filter-1 firewall, Untold clamp reconciliation). Exact coefficients -> game-loop (D-005.3).
